issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (when DON!! is activated), not 'OnAttack'. The effect activates when paying DON!!, not when the leader attacks.
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Should be 'TrashFromDeck' (trash from top of deck, not hand). 'TrashFromHand' does not exist in valid action types.
Missing condition for DON!! cost. Should include 'HasAttachedDon' with value 1 to represent the [DON!! x1] requirement.
Effect is missing the trigger condition that this occurs when 'this Leader's attack deals damage to your opponent's Life'. Current structure does not capture the damage-dealing requirement.
